tier: Tier 7.4c - Cost-Aware Policy/Action Promotion + Compact Regression
claim: Tier 7.4c locked the Tier 7.4b cost-aware policy/action candidate and passed the full NEST compact regression gate. The candidate preserved its expected-utility advantage, sham/ablation separation, no-action guard, and leakage boundary, authorizing a v2.4 software baseline freeze while keeping hardware/native transfer blocked.
caveat: Software promotion/regression evidence only; not public usefulness proof, not broad anomaly benchmark superiority, not hardware/native transfer, not planning, and not AGI/ASI evidence.
